things.name: Cite du Vin
things.description: Extraordinary wine museum dedicated to world wine culture with sweeping river views

things.name: Place de la Bourse
things.description: Stunning 18th-century square reflected in the Miroir d'Eau water mirror

things.name: Miroir d'Eau
things.description: World's largest reflecting pool creating mesmerising mirror effects on the quayside

things.name: Saint-Andre Cathedral
things.description: Gothic UNESCO-listed cathedral with twin towers and separate Pey-Berland bell tower

things.name: Wine Chateaux Tours
things.description: Day trips to legendary estates of Saint-Emilion, Medoc and Pomerol wine regions

things.name: Grand Theatre de Bordeaux
things.description: Magnificent 18th-century neoclassical theatre, inspiration for the Paris Opera Garnier

things.name: Jardin Public
things.description: Elegant 18th-century garden with botanical collections, puppet theatre and bandstand

things.name: Darwin Ecosystem
things.description: Pioneering sustainable complex in former military barracks with skate park and organic market

things.name: Pont de Pierre
things.description: Napoleon's elegant 17-arch stone bridge crossing the Garonne river

things.name: Rue Sainte-Catherine
things.description: One of Europe's longest pedestrian shopping streets lined with boutiques and cafes
